summary: Comprehensive testing of Kent 11+ Grammar Schools Hub completed. Both backend APIs and frontend functionality tested successfully with excellent results.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile filter toggle button not visible on tablet view (768px width)

passed_tests: All 15 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Homepage loads with hero section, stats (32 schools, 4835 places), and featured schools
Navigation between all pages (Home, Schools, Compare, Exam Info)
Schools filter by gender (Boys: 14, Girls: 14, Co-ed: 4 schools)
Schools sort by name, pupils, places, and competition ratio
Compare page allows selecting schools and shows comparison table
Exam Info page displays comprehensive exam format information
API integration working perfectly across all endpoints
Responsive design works on desktop and tablet
